stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The cloud is a (1)_____, which is formed by (2)_____ and triggered by (3)_____. The vertical growth of the cloud is restricted by (4)_____.

options.a: (1) Altocumulus castellanus; (2) convection; (3) orographic lifting; (4) a subsidence inversion.
options.b: (1) Cumulonimbus capillatus; (2) advection; (3) heating from below; (4) the tropopause.
options.c: (1) Cumulus; (2) advection; (3) turbulence; (4) a sea breeze inversion.
options.d: (1) Cumulus; (2) convection; (3) heating from below; (4) a subsidence inversion.
